blocker: Account creation requires a password. Jacobs' Phenom enforces a strict policy that REJECTS the shared password 'Career0324!' ('The password doesn't meet the security requirements... Not contain commonly used words'). Per standing rule (feedback_jamie_account_password.md) I must use the ONE shared password and NEVER generate a per-account password. Genuine conflict -> cannot create the account autonomously.
sponsorship_question: NOT present on this step (Application details). The work-authorization/sponsorship question typically appears on the next step (Additional questions). Would be answered Sponsorship Required = YES per RULE 0.
what_jamie_needs_to_do: Open the staged tab (careers.jacobs.com Register, jobId 39977). Every field is filled. Set BOTH password fields to a value that satisfies Jacobs policy (>=10 chars, upper+lower+number, special char not adjacent to another special, no common word like 'career', <4 sequential/repeated/consecutive). Then Save & continue -> answer remaining steps (Additional questions [sponsorship=Yes], Inclusion & belonging [Woman/Asian/not-Hispanic/no-disability/non-veteran or decline], Job specific questions) -> Submit.
notes: Tab left OPEN and fully staged (CDP, not held with sleep). No false 'submitted'. Strong-fit role; worth finishing manually.
